description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile wooden cabinet with a light beige finish, designed for use as a media console or storage unit. The front features two doors on either side and two open shelves in the center, suitable for holding electronics or decorative items. The sides and back are solid panels, providing structural support and a clean appearance. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with short, integrated feet, giving it a stable and grounded look. The surface is flat and expansive, ideal for placing a television, decor, or other objects. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with no visible handles or ornate details.
description: A light beige, rectangular wooden cabinet with two doors and two open shelves, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from the side, showing a solid panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: The back of the cabinet is visible, displaying a plain, uninterrupted wooden panel.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a solid panel and no openings.
description_view_3: The front of the cabinet, showing two doors on the sides and two open shelves in the center.
